title: erigeron frutescens
intro: Erigeron frutescens, also known as Riddell's goldenrod, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Erigeron frutescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of this plant include its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Erigeron frutescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
